Skip to contents
readoecd 0.3.4
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Economic Indicators

Download key OECD economic datasets

get_oecd_gdp()
Get OECD GDP data
get_oecd_cpi()
Get OECD CPI inflation data
get_oecd_unemployment()
Get OECD unemployment rates
get_oecd_tax()
Get OECD tax revenue data
get_oecd_deficit()
Get OECD government deficit data

Social Indicators

Download OECD social and structural datasets

get_oecd_health()
Get OECD health expenditure data
get_oecd_education()
Get OECD education expenditure data
get_oecd_inequality()
Get OECD income inequality data

Productivity & Trade

Download OECD productivity and trade datasets

get_oecd_productivity()
Get OECD productivity data
get_oecd_current_account()
Get OECD trade (balance of payments) data

Utilities

Helper functions for managing countries, connectivity, and cache

list_oecd_countries()
List OECD member countries
check_oecd_api()
Check OECD API connectivity
clear_oecd_cache()
Clear the readoecd local cache

On this page

Developed by Charles Coverdale.
